value_signal: active drafting and validation continue; demo record recommends continuing
active_users_status: owner and future readers remain intended audiences
active_maintainers_status: human maintainer required for protected actions
open_risks: reader edition still requires human editorial review before major version publication
archival_plan: archive public repository and rendered site snapshot if project sunsets
fork_or_transfer_path: human maintainer can fork or transfer repository under ordinary GitHub controls
appeal_path: human maintainer review before archive or transfer
non_claims: This fixture does not perform a real sunset review.
This fixture does not prove the project should continue indefinitely.
